top_signals.title: Peer-Beating Tech Fund Doubles China Exposure in Contrarian Bet
top_signals.summary: A peer-beating technology stock fund is taking profits on some hot US trades and adding exposure in China, seeing opportunities in the Asian nation’s internet giants and hardware makers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve issues FOMC statement
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board and Federal Open Market Committee release economic projections from the June 16-17 FOMC meeting
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board and Federal Open Market Committee release economic projections from the June 16-17 FOMC meeting
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Here we go again? Assessing the inflation risks of the recent energy shock − speech by Megan Greene
top_signals.summary: Given at University of Derby Business School
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: U.K.'s Keir Starmer on the verge of quitting
top_signals.summary: A war of words in Westminster could cost U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer his job, as the leader looks set to resign amid pressure from within his party.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The best parents and leaders use a 3-step formula to help people handle uncertainty, says Dr. Becky Kennedy
top_signals.summary: Even if you can't control an outcome, you can still help your child or co-worker feel more at ease with uncertainty, just by how you describe a situation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Memory crisis hits such extremes that 'even Apple can't be safe'
top_signals.summary: Apple appears poised to take the rare step of increasing prices to deal with what CEO Tim Cook called an "unsustainable" memory shortage.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Why a 66-year-old water treaty is becoming the latest India-Pakistan flashpoint
top_signals.summary: India and Pakistan are locked in a dispute over the Indus Water Treaty after New Delhi suspended the pact, raising concerns about regional stability.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Piero Cipollone: Digital euro: the future of money
PRA sets out adjustments to its market risk internal model approach under Basel 3.1
top_signals.summary: The Prudential Regulation Authority (PRA) has today published a consultation on the internal model approach to market risk (IMA), which represents the final piece of Basel 3.1’s implementation in the UK.

top_signals.title: Accredited official statistics: Public sector finances bulletin
top_signals.summary: The public sector finances statistical bulletin.

top_signals.title: Takaichi says consumption tax cut would last only two years
top_signals.summary: Asked if the cut would expire after two years even if the economy worsened, the prime minister said the measure is only "a bridge" until a refundable tax credit program is created.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

alerts.title: Webinar: How attackers bypass MFA and how defenders can respond
alerts.summary: Modern phishing attacks, including Device Code phishing, can undermine MFA protections and grant attackers access to corporate accounts without stealing passwords. This webinar explores how behavioral AI can help security teams detect compromised accounts faster and automate response workflows. [...]
